title: Xenith's Beacon Infused Armor
body:
Xeniths Beacon Infused Armor!

This is a mod that gives you the ability to add beacon effects into your armour! you can put one beacon effect on each armour piece (the effect varies on the armour piece) BUT! The chestplate gets 3 effects! There are so many combinations of effects that you can add to your chestplate. But you don't start out with max level effects. You have to UPGRADE them. By pressing U in game an upgrade menu will appear! Each upgrade has two levels. Your beacon effect starts at level one. But then you can use TEN (xp) levels to upgrade it to level two, and FIFTEEN (xp) levels to upgrade to a level three beacon effect!

Do you want to take on the challenge to upgrade ALL levels? Do you want to become the full wielder of all effects? Well come on and give it a try!

*You can find a built-in help book in game for more information. Just Press V.

*My mod on Mcreator: https://mcreator.net/modification/113618/xeniths-beacon-infused-armour

*My mod on Curseforge:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xeniths-beacon-infused-armor/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xeniths-beacon-infused-armor/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20)

*Supported Versions: 1.21.1 (1.21.4 coming soon)

*Please leave a comment on the mod if you find any, Bugs, Exploits, or Issues!

*And most of all Have Fun Playing!

"You are free to showcase and record videos of this mod. Please credit me with a link to the official mod page."
